tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Intro]
|[ch]Dm[/ch]  |[ch]C[/ch]   |[ch]Gm[/ch]  |[ch]Gm[/ch]  | x4


[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]         [ch]C[/ch]                   [ch]Gm[/ch]
   I don't want this night to end[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Dm[/ch]              [ch]C[/ch]              [ch]Gm[/ch]
It's closing time, so leave with me again, yeah[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]         [ch]C[/ch]                [ch]Gm[/ch]
   You got all my love to spend, oh[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Dm[/ch]                 [ch]C[/ch]           [ch]Gm[/ch]
Let's find a place where happiness begins[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus]
[tab]            [ch]Dm[/ch]                       [ch]C[/ch]
We're gonna dance in my living room, slave to the way you move[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gm[/ch]
Hurts when I'm leaving you (Ay)[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Dm[/ch]                        [ch]C[/ch]
Just dance in the living room, love with an attitude[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gm[/ch]
Drunk to an 80s groove (Ay)[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Dm[/ch]                       [ch]C[/ch]
We're gonna dance in my living room, slave to the way you move[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gm[/ch]
Hurts when I'm leaving you (Ayy)[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]                        [ch]C[/ch]
Dance in the living room, love with an attitude[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gm[/ch]
Drunk[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]          [ch]Dm[/ch]    [ch]C[/ch]                       [ch]Gm[/ch]
It's only human when you know that it's real[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]Dm[/ch]                [ch]C[/ch]                   [ch]Gm[/ch]
So why would you fight or try to deny the way that you feel?[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]Dm[/ch]      [ch]C[/ch]                [ch]Gm[/ch]
Oh babe, you can't fool me, your body's got other plans[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Dm[/ch]                     [ch]C[/ch]                     [ch]Gm[/ch]
So stop pretending you're shy, just come on and dance, dance, dance, dance[/tab]


[Instrumental]
[tab]|[ch]Dm[/ch]  |[ch]C[/ch]   |[ch]Gm[/ch]  |[ch]Gm[/ch]  | x2
 Oh[/tab]


[Verse 2]
[tab]N.C.                    [ch]Gm[/ch]
   Early morning la-la-light[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Dm[/ch]          [ch]C[/ch]                 [ch]Gm[/ch]
Only getting up to close the blinds, oh[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]              [ch]C[/ch]                      [ch]Gm[/ch]
   I'm praying you don't change your mind[/tab]
[tab]                                    [ch]Dm[/ch]
'Cause leaving now just don't feel right[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]C[/ch]              [ch]Gm[/ch]
Let's do it one more time, oh babe[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus]
[tab]            [ch]Dm[/ch]                       [ch]C[/ch]
We're gonna dance in my living room, slave to the way you move[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gm[/ch]
Hurts when I'm leaving you (Hurts when I'm leaving you)[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Dm[/ch]                        [ch]C[/ch]
Just dance in the living room, love with an attitude[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gm[/ch]
Drunk to an 80s groove (Ay)[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Dm[/ch]                       [ch]C[/ch]
We're gonna dance in my living room, slave to the way you move[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gm[/ch]
Hurts when I'm leaving you (Ayy)[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]                        [ch]C[/ch]
Dance in the living room, love with an attitude[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gm[/ch]
Drunk[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]          [ch]Dm[/ch]    [ch]C[/ch]                       [ch]Gm[/ch]
It's only human when you know that it's real (Know that it's real)[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]Dm[/ch]                [ch]C[/ch]                   [ch]Gm[/ch]
So why would you fight or try to deny the way that you feel? (The way that you feel)[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]Dm[/ch]      [ch]C[/ch]                [ch]Gm[/ch]
Oh babe, you can't fool me, your body's got other plans[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Dm[/ch]                     [ch]C[/ch]                     [ch]Gm[/ch]
So stop pretending you're shy, just come on and dance, dance, dance, dance[/tab]


[Post-Chorus]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]     [ch]C[/ch]         [ch]Gm[/ch]
Oh    (Dance, oh)   woo, ay[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Dm[/ch]               [ch]C[/ch]                 [ch]Gm[/ch]
(Only human) It's only ('man), it's only ('man), only human[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]     [ch]C[/ch]     [ch]Gm[/ch]
          Oh yeah, yeah, yeah[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Dm[/ch]               [ch]C[/ch]                 [ch]Gm[/ch]
(Only human) It's only ('man), it's only ('man), only human[/tab]


[Outro]
|[ch]Dm[/ch]  |[ch]C[/ch]   |
